Stage 0: resolve
(Any to random, fill blanks)
api_create_story_ai.php

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stage 1: merge into PLAN template
system = template + audience + fonts + guardrails
user = premise/genre/tone/scenes/endings

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

Request JSON to Claude
(model, system, messages, max_tokens 4000)

merge SCENE template + that scene's context

queue 1 cover + N image jobs

systemCtx + image_prompt + style + mood
